summary: Frontend testing of /dine page fixes for tab filtering, duplicate tabs, category card navigation, and restaurants section. ALL TESTS PASS.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /dine page tab filtering and navigation features verified working. Load More Restaurants button logic is correct but won't appear with current seed data (only 1 non-featured restaurant, button shows when >6 non-featured exist).

duplicate_all_dine_tab.details: Only ONE 'All Dine' tab found in navigation. No duplicates.

feeding_tools_tab_filtering.details: Clicking 'Feeding Tools' tab updates URL to /dine?tab=feeding-tools and Dine Essentials section shows 'Feeding Tools' header with filtered products (bowls, feeders, etc.)

supplements_tab_filtering.details: Clicking 'Supplements' tab updates URL to /dine?tab=supplements and Dine Essentials section shows 'Supplements' header with filtered products (vitamins, probiotics, etc.)

all_dine_tab_default.details: Clicking 'All Dine' tab returns URL to /dine and shows 'Dine Essentials' header with all products

feeding_tools_category_card_navigation.details: Category card 'Feeding Tools' in Explore Dine section correctly links to /dine?section=essentials&category=feeding-tools. Auto-scrolls to Dine Essentials section.

fresh_meals_tab.details: Fresh Meals tab shows dedicated FreshMealsTab component with meal planning interface (Goal selection, Protein preference, Cadence options)

restaurants_section.details: Concierge Featured Restaurants section displays 23 restaurant cards with proper images, ratings, Reserve buttons. Search and filters (city, pet menu) are functional.

load_more_restaurants.details: Load More Restaurants button logic is correct. Button only appears when more than 6 non-featured restaurants exist. Current data has 21 featured and only 1 non-featured restaurant, so button correctly does not appear.
